full_text:
Lu Mao (Zizhang) 陸瑁 (子璋)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lu Mao (陸瑁), styledZizhang (子璋), was born in Wu. Noted scholar who helped refugee colleagues. Eventually joined Wu and argued against attacking Gongsun Yuan. Lu Mao was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Lu Mao lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
